 Global toggle: request accurate/expensive integration path.
 

Detailed Description

Abstract base for incident fields (excitations) used in SIE.

Derived classes must implement both pointwise evaluations and the RWG-based integral projections that populate the excitation vectors. When working in a layered background, implementations typically rely on a layered Green's function provided via setGrnFunLayered.

Definition at line 34 of file IncidentField.h.

◆ EvaluateE()

virtual cvec IncidentField::EvaluateE ( rvec position)
pure virtual

Evaluate the incident electric field \(\mathbf{E}^{inc}(\mathbf{r})\).

Parameters
positionObservation point in Cartesian coordinates.
Returns
Complex 3-vector (Ex, Ey, Ez).

Implemented in Dipole, Gaussian, and PlaneWave.

◆ EvaluateH()

virtual cvec IncidentField::EvaluateH ( rvec position)
pure virtual

Evaluate the incident magnetic field \(\mathbf{H}^{inc}(\mathbf{r})\).

Parameters
positionObservation point in Cartesian coordinates.
Returns
Complex 3-vector (Hx, Hy, Hz).

Implemented in Dipole, Gaussian, and PlaneWave.

◆ EvaluateLayeredEandH()

virtual std::vector< cvec > IncidentField::EvaluateLayeredEandH ( rvec position)
pure virtual

Evaluate \((\mathbf{E}^{inc}, \mathbf{H}^{inc})\) in layered media.

Parameters
positionObservation point in Cartesian coordinates.
Returns
A 2-element vector: \((\mathbf{E}^{inc}, \mathbf{H}^{inc})\), each a complex 3-vector.

Implemented in Dipole, Gaussian, and PlaneWave.

◆ IntegrateE()

virtual dcmplx IncidentField::IntegrateE ( RWGFun * f)
pure virtual

RWG projection of the incident electric field.

Performs the scalar test integral on the triangle supporting the RWG basis function f to assemble the electric-field excitation entry.

Parameters
fPointer to the RWG test function.
Returns
Complex scalar contribution for the excitation vector.

Implemented in Dipole, Gaussian, and PlaneWave.

◆ IntegrateH()

virtual dcmplx IncidentField::IntegrateH ( RWGFun * f)
pure virtual

RWG projection of the incident magnetic field.

Parameters
fPointer to the RWG test function.
Returns
Complex scalar contribution for the excitation vector.

Implemented in Dipole, Gaussian, and PlaneWave.

◆ IntegrateLayeredEandH()

virtual std::vector< dcmplx > IncidentField::IntegrateLayeredEandH ( RWGFun * f)
pure virtual

RWG projection of \((\mathbf{E}^{inc}, \mathbf{H}^{inc})\) in layered media.

Parameters
fPointer to the RWG test function.
Returns
Two complex scalars: \((\mathbf{E}^{exc}, \mathbf{H}^{exc})\).

Implemented in Dipole, Gaussian, and PlaneWave.

◆ setGrnFunLayered()

virtual void IncidentField::setGrnFunLayered ( GreenF * fGrnFields,
std::vector< Grid > tabGrids )
pure virtual

Provide layered-medium Green's function and its tabulation grids.

Parameters
fGrnFieldsPointer to a Green's-function backend (homogeneous or layered). The callee does not take ownership.
tabGridsInterpolation grids used by the layered backend.

Implemented in Dipole, Gaussian, and PlaneWave.
